response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has advanced to the Series A stage with $8.5M in funding from investors Sequoia and YC, a $42M valuation, and a team of 18 people. The company also reports a monthly recurring revenue (MRR) of $120K and a strong 25% month-over-month (MoM) growth rate, underscoring its rapid upward momentum.
